public_option_scope.description: Choose the longer scenic route with more exposed sections.
Choose the shorter protected route with less exposure and better escape.

uncertainty: The protective alarm and action direction are clear; the precise alarm level remains open.

visible_observations.perceived_value_json: {"visible_description":"Thinking about exposed sections brings strong bodily protective tension tied to a spatial boundary; a protected route with a retreat option reduces the alarm."}
{"visible_description":"There is a clear impulse to seek a safer direction with less exposure and a better retreat option."}
